items.title: AI日报
items.mainLine: 今日筛出 21 条 AI 技术信号，优先看 「Inside NVIDIA Rubin GPU Architecture: Powering the Era of Agentic AI」、「NVIDIA Vera CPU: Olympus Cores Built for Maximum Single-Thread Performance in Agentic AI」。脉络集中在大模型训练/推理、Agent Skill、Auto-Research/Harness 与可复制工程实践。
